myPageDescription: This is your personal dashboard. Here you can view your profile, recent activity, friends online, and quick actions.
newsDescription: Stay updated with posts from friends, communities, and trending topics in your feed.
messagesDescription: Chat with friends, view conversations, and manage your messages.
friendsDescription: Manage your friends list, send friend requests, and see who’s online.
communitiesDescription: Browse, join, and manage communities you are part of.
photosDescription: Upload, organize, and share your photos and albums.
musicDescription: Listen to playlists, discover new tracks, and manage your music library.
gamesDescription: Play games, see your achievements, and connect with other gamers.
videoDescription: Watch videos, live streams, and manage your video library.
appsDescription: Browse and manage all your installed apps and mini-applications.
paymentsDescription: View transactions, manage payment methods, and check your balance.
jobsDescription: Find job opportunities, manage applications, and explore career options.
ordersDescription: Track your orders, view purchase history, and manage deliveries.
productsDescription: Browse and manage products you sell or have purchased.
bookmarksDescription: All your bookmarked posts, articles, profiles, and content.
filesDescription: Upload, organize, and access all your files and documents.
adsDescription: Create, manage, and track your advertisements and campaigns.
